title: Logging and Monitoring - Policies and Procedures for Handling Cloud Service Derived Data and Account Data
label: OPS-11

customer-requirements.title: Corresponding Requirements for Cloud Service Customers

prose.en: Cloud service customers ensure with suitable controls that their contracts with the cloud service provider clearly outline the permissible uses of cloud service derived data. Cloud service customers verify that such data processing complies with contractual or legal restrictions and understand that the provider is obligated to delete data when it is no longer necessary for its initial purposes, unless agreed otherwise.
